name: caya-bot-panel
description: CaYa Bot Panel - Minecraft multi-bot control panel (mineflayer)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
